channel.title: Salman Muqtadir
channel.description: Unofficial RSS feed for Salman Muqtadir

item.title: Asholei ki kumir bhoyonkor, ar asholei ki kukur kono gaali? Thik ajaan er shomoy...
item.description: Asholei ki kumir bhoyonkor, ar asholei ki kukur kono gaali? Thik ajaan er shomoy howa ei ghotona ta theke onek kichu amader bujhar ase ekhono. Onek kichu mathay process korar ase. Onek kichu bukey chepe shojho korar ase. Eita amader reality. Ekta desh bhora shudhu murkho, jaahil, omanush.
